calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Leanna Dawydiak (Trustee of the Dawydiak Trust/Respondent). Valerie Horn appearing by Court Call for Nina Salvino (Trustee of the Achille Muschi Trust/Respondent).

Mr. Melbostad presented oral argument in support of his position, that all requirement of a Heggstad petition has been met and that he request for an order instructing transfer of interest rather than having to file a Heggstad petition. Ms. Horn is in support of Mr. Melbostad's position. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Oct-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
